raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"activity_preference","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"I've noticed that I tend to retain more information from audiobooks than e-books, maybe because audiobooks are more engaging or because I can multitask while listening to them.","distilled_fact":"The user tends to retain more information from audiobooks than e-books."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"note_taking_habit","confidence":0.96,"matched_text":"I've started taking notes while listening to audiobooks, especially if it's a non-fiction book with valuable insights or information.","distilled_fact":"The user has started taking notes while listening to audiobooks."},{"signal_kind":"potential_preference","object_kind":"note_taking_habit","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"I've started taking notes while listening to audiobooks, especially if it's a non-fiction book with valuable insights or information.","distilled_fact":"The user especially takes notes while listening to non-fiction audiobooks with valuable insights or information."}]}
